The '''''Darkvenge''''' was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]] under the command of [[Vicelord]] [[Siv Kav]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

It was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious']] [[Special Task Force One]], with which he intended to destroy ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. However, [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] ([[Core name/Legends|core name]] "Thrawn") of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]] [[Destruction of Special Task Force One|attacked and destroyed]] the entirety of Sidious' Task Force with the exception of the ''Darkvenge''.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Darkvenge'' was first mentioned, albeit anonymously, in in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[1998]] novel ''[[Vision of the Future]]''.<ref name="Vision">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref> It first appeared and was named in Zahn's [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
